description: 1939–1945 global conflict
description_wiki: World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.

description: aerial warfare branch of the United States Army from 1941 to 1947
description_wiki: The United States Army Air Forces (USAAF or AAF) was the major land-based aerial warfare service component of the United States Army and de facto aerial warfare service branch of the United States during and immediately after World War II (1941–1947).

description: 1944-1946 United States Army Air Forces major command
description_wiki: Continental Air Forces (CAF) was a United States Army Air Forces major command, active 1944–1946.

description: private research university in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, United States
description_wiki: Carnegie Mellon University (CMU) is a private research university in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, United States.

description: county seat and city of Orange County, California, United States
description_wiki: Santa Ana (Spanish for 'Saint Anne') is a city in and the county seat of Orange County, California, United States.

description: city in and seat of Kent County, Michigan, United States
description_wiki: Grand Rapids is a city in and the county seat of Kent County, Michigan, United States.

aliases: War to Resist US Aggression and Aid Korea
description: war between North and South Korea, 1950–1953
description_wiki: The Korean War (25 June 1950 – 27 July 1953) was an armed conflict the Korean Peninsula fought between North Korea (Democratic People's Republic of Korea; DPRK) and South Korea (Republic of Korea; ROK) and their allies.

description: British overseas territory in the North Atlantic Ocean
description_wiki: Bermuda is a British Overseas Territory in the North Atlantic Ocean.

description: seat of Maricopa County, largest city in, and capital of, the State of Arizona, United States
description_wiki: Phoenix (  FEE-niks) is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Arizona.

description: city in and county seat of Kent County, Delaware, United States, and capital city of Delaware
description_wiki: Dover ( DOH-vər) is the capital and the second-most populous city of the U.S. state of Delaware, after Wilmington.

description: United States military award
description_wiki: The Good Conduct Medal is one of the oldest military awards of the United States Armed Forces.

aliases: United States Military Air Transport Service
description: 1948-1966 United States Armed Forces unified command
description_wiki: The Military Air Transport Service (MATS) is an inactive Department of Defense Unified Command.

description: ocean between Europe, Africa and the Americas
description_wiki: The Atlantic Ocean is the second largest of the world's five oceanic divisions, with an area of about 85,133,000 square kilometers (32,870,000 sq mi).

description: country in north-west Europe, part of the United Kingdom
description_wiki: England is a country that is part of the United Kingdom.

description: terrestrial continent located in north-western Eurasia
description_wiki: Europe is a continent located entirely in the Northern Hemisphere and mostly in the Eastern Hemisphere.

description: country in Western Europe and other continents (through its overseas territories in America, Africa and Oceania)
description_wiki: France, officially the French Republic, is a country primarily located in Western Europe.

description: northernmost region of the African continent
description_wiki: North Africa, also known as Northern Africa, is a region encompassing the northern portion of the African continent.

description_wiki: Michigan State University (Michigan State or MSU) is a public land-grant research university in East Lansing, Michigan, United States.

description: organization of U.S. war veterans
description_wiki: The American Legion, commonly known as the Legion, is an organization of U.S. veterans headquartered in Indianapolis, Indiana.

description: military academy near Colorado Springs, Colorado, USA
description_wiki: The United States Air Force Academy (USAFA) is a United States service academy in Air Force Academy, Colorado, immediately north of Colorado Springs.

description: armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.

description: largest city in the U.S. state of South Carolina
description_wiki: Charleston is the most populous city in the U.S. state of South Carolina.
